name: Amara Mining plc
description: Amara Mining plc, formerly Cluff Gold plc, is a gold exploration and development company focused on West Africa. The company's main assets include the Yaoure Gold Project in Cote d'Ivoire and the Baomahun Gold Project in Sierra Leone. Amara Mining was acquired by Perseus Mining Limited in 2016, which integrated Amara's high-quality West African gold assets into its own portfolio to enhance its growth profile and production capabilities.
